title: Dino's Kingdom
description: This RPG inspired modpack was created in honor of callxmexdino, who is a very cool person, as well as their fans!! Welcome to Dino's Kingdom!!
body: This modpack is made in honor of, and with approval of, callxmexdino!! It has a lot of RPG Elements, magic and machinery. One thing that has NOT been changed is **progression**. You will be perfectly free to explore, get diamonds, get netherite, beat the ender dragon. Just like in vanilla! BUT THERE IS MORE TO DO!! With BetterEnd and BetterNether there is an expanded post game and equipment. **Notable mods include:** BetterCombat, the RPG Series, Create, Bewitchment, BetterNether and End, MC Dungeons Series, and so much more!! We have also added massive optimization improvements so the pack will work on lighter hardware. Sodium is just the tip of the iceberg! There is an official server that is currently in beta test, so stay tuned for that!! **Credits to mods hosted on external sites:** More Villagers - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers Dank Storage - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dank-storage **We are also partnered with Kinetic Hosting!! Please use code "KappaTea" at checkout to save 15% off your first month!!**
